title: StyleLabor Hero
description: StyleLabor Hero is a superhero modpack with vanilla+, technic mods and other quality of life mods!
body:
# StyleLabor Hero

Step into the role of your **personal superhero** and create your own story in Minecraft!

StyleLabor Hero is an exciting modpack for Minecraft 1.20.1 that takes you into a world full of superpowers and adventures. Whether you prefer to fly through the air, defeat your opponents with superhuman strength or build your base - here you have the freedom to be your own superhero.

### What you can expect:

+ A variety of mods allow you to play like you want!
+ Build stunning buildings and bases with new blocks and materials.
+ Face new, dangerous mobs and master demanding tasks.
+ Meet up with other players in voice chat and claim your own territory.
